brief_summary: A sparkline timeline chart showing the tracker arc across three 2026 DCS group buys. Five labeled data points: W19 Olivetti +18 (warm-grey), W21 Grass Valley +22 (ochre), W22 Grass Valley +23 (ochre, flat), W23 Grass Valley -18 (ochre, down arrow at post-close dip), and W23 Dolch +29 (warm-grey, up arrow showing baton-pass opening). Shared horizontal time axis with a zero baseline and vertical dashed dividers at W21 and W23 to mark the Grass Valley open and close.
